title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, taught by David J. Malan. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with a large community across multiple platforms including Discord, GitHub, and Reddit.
